svg.title: Worms Miyoo Mini Plus — development phases
svg.desc: Six-phase roadmap from terrain engine to full multiplayer with ELO on Miyoo Mini Plus and RPi4 server

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Give me a detailed breakdown of Phase 1: terrain and physics for a Worms-like game on Miyoo Mini Plus in Rust')
g.text: Perlin heightmap · crater carving · Euler projectile ballistics · wind

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I generate Perlin noise terrain for a Worms game in Rust?')
sendPrompt('How do I implement Euler integration for projectile physics in a 2D game?')
sendPrompt('How do I carve circular craters into a pixel terrain bitmap in Rust?')
sendPrompt('Give me a detailed breakdown of Phase 2: Miyoo framebuffer renderer for a Worms game in Rust')
g.text: /dev/fb0 BGRA · evdev buttons · 8×8 font · hot-seat local play

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I write pixels directly to /dev/fb0 on Miyoo Mini Plus in Rust?')
sendPrompt('How do I read evdev input on Miyoo Mini Plus in Rust?')
sendPrompt('How do I play audio on Miyoo Mini Plus using ALSA dlopen in Rust at 8000Hz mono?')
sendPrompt('Give me a detailed breakdown of Phase 3: weapons and turn system for a Worms game in Rust')
g.text: Weapon set · turn timer · worm selection · win condition · hot-seat complete

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What weapons should I implement first in a Worms-like game?')
sendPrompt('How should turn timers and worm selection work in a Worms-like game?')
sendPrompt('How do I implement win conditions and HUD for a Worms-like game?')
sendPrompt('Give me a detailed breakdown of Phase 4: dedicated server on RPi4 for a Worms game in Rust')
g.text: Authoritative sim · TCP bincode · room codes · direct invite · cross-compile aarch64

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I design an authoritative game server for a turn-based game in Rust with Tokio?')
sendPrompt('How do I implement room codes and direct invite links for a multiplayer game?')
sendPrompt('How do I cross-compile a Rust server binary for Raspberry Pi 4 aarch64?')
sendPrompt('Give me a detailed breakdown of Phase 5: accounts, auth, and ELO matchmaking for a Worms game in Rust')
g.text: JWT auth · PostgreSQL · ELO queue · bracket expansion · leaderboard

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I implement JWT auth and Argon2 password hashing in Rust?')
sendPrompt('How does ELO rating work and how do I implement a matchmaking queue with bracket expansion in Rust?')
sendPrompt('How do I build a leaderboard and rank tiers for a competitive Worms-like game?')
sendPrompt('Give me a detailed breakdown of Phase 6: polish and live ops for a Worms game on Miyoo Mini Plus')
g.text: Sound effects · sprite animation · spectator · server monitoring

svg.text: Client: Rust armv7 · /dev/fb0 BGRA · evdev · dlopen ALSA 8kHz · raw TCP
Server: Rust aarch64 · Tokio · PostgreSQL · Redis · zigbuild → RPi4
Click any phase or component to go deeper
